questionHtml: Find the number of surveyed students who did not like any of the three flavours.
markschemeHtml:
85 − (3 + 16 + 11 + 18 + 12 + 1 + 2)      (M1)

Note: Award (M1) for subtracting the sum of their values from 85.

22      (A1)(ft)  (C2)

Note: Follow through from their Venn diagram in part (a).
If any numbers that are being subtracted are negative award (M1)(A0).

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the number of surveyed students who did not like any of the three flavours.
